title: Installing kubeadm — Before you begin
text:
A compatible Linux host. The Kubernetes project provides generic instructions for Linux distributions
based on Debian and Red Hat, and those distributions without a package manager.
2 GB or more of RAM per machine (any less will leave little room for your apps).
2 CPUs or more for control plane machines.
Full network connectivity between all machines in the cluster (public or private network is fine).
Unique hostname, MAC address, and product_uuid for every node. See
here
for more details.
Certain ports are open on your machines. See
here
for more details.
